testcase.name: test_food_categories
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_seller_dependencies_verification.py:369: in test_food_categories assert response.status_code == 200, f"Food categories failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Food categories failed: {"detail":"تم حظرك مؤقتاً. حاول بعد 299 ثانية","error_code":"RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_templates_apply_free

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 429 assert 429 in [422, 400] + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_seller_dependencies_verification.py:409: in test_templates_apply_free assert response.status_code in [422, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 429 E assert 429 in [422, 400] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
